ShortDescription.Value: Fixes the bug where businesses in the city do not import goods from DLC harbors.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Retired
The Bridges & Ports harbor import and mail transfer issues have now been fixed officially in the latest game version.
Because of that, this mod now disables its fix automatically on game version 1.5.7f1 and newer. It should no longer affect your game on the latest version.
If you are on the latest game version, feel free to unsubscribe. I am keeping this page available for now so players on older game versions can still use the fix if needed.
## Original fix
This mod originally fixed an issue where businesses could skip Bridges & Ports DLC cargo harbors when importing goods.
It also fixed a similar issue affecting mail transfer, where DLC cargo harbors could be skipped as valid mail transfer targets.

ChangeLog.Value: Disabled the fix on the latest game version because the issue has now been fixed officially. This mod is planned to be retired, so feel free to unsubscribe if you are on the latest game version.
